# susometa

The susometa package provides functions to:

- Parse Survey Solutions’ questionnaire metadata from JSON file to
  rectangular data frame
- Extract questionnaire objects and their attributes (e.g., sections,
  rosters, questions, answer options, etc.)

## Installation

Since susometa is not yet available on CRAN, it can be installed from
GitHub as follows:

``` r

if (!require("pak")) install.packages("pak")
pak::pak("lsms-worldbank/susometa")
```

# Package index

## Questionnaire

Functions for getting full questionnaire content or questionnaire
metadata.

- [`parse_questionnaire()`](https://lsms-worldbank.github.io/susometa/reference/parse_questionnaire.md)
  : Parses JSON questionnaire file into rectangular data frame
- [`get_qnr_metadata()`](https://lsms-worldbank.github.io/susometa/reference/get_qnr_metadata.md)
  : Get metadata on questionnaire document metadata.

## Groups

Get metadata about groups that contain questions

- [`get_sections()`](https://lsms-worldbank.github.io/susometa/reference/get_sections.md)
  : Get metadata for section.
- [`get_sub_sections()`](https://lsms-worldbank.github.io/susometa/reference/get_sub_sections.md)
  : Get metadata for sub-sections
- [`get_rosters()`](https://lsms-worldbank.github.io/susometa/reference/get_rosters.md)
  : Get metadata about rosters.

## Content

Get metadata about questions, variables, and static text

- [`get_questions()`](https://lsms-worldbank.github.io/susometa/reference/get_questions.md)
  : Get metadata for questions
- [`get_variables()`](https://lsms-worldbank.github.io/susometa/reference/get_variables.md)
  : Get metadata for computed variables.
- [`get_questions_by_section()`](https://lsms-worldbank.github.io/susometa/reference/get_questions_by_section.md)
  : Get questions with the section to which each belongs.
- [`get_static_texts()`](https://lsms-worldbank.github.io/susometa/reference/get_static_texts.md)
  : Get metadata on static text.
- [`get_validations()`](https://lsms-worldbank.github.io/susometa/reference/get_validations.md)
  : Get metadata for validations

## Answer options

Get answer options, however they are defined in Designer– whether

- [`get_answer_options()`](https://lsms-worldbank.github.io/susometa/reference/get_answer_options.md)
  : Get answer options
- [`get_ms_answers_as_var_labels()`](https://lsms-worldbank.github.io/susometa/reference/get_ms_answers_as_var_labels.md)
  : Get mutli-select answers as variable labels

## Resources

- [`get_macros()`](https://lsms-worldbank.github.io/susometa/reference/get_macros.md)
  : Get metadata for macros.
- [`get_categories()`](https://lsms-worldbank.github.io/susometa/reference/get_categories.md)
  : Get metadata on categories.
- [`get_translations()`](https://lsms-worldbank.github.io/susometa/reference/get_translations.md)
  : Get metadata about translations.
- [`get_attachments()`](https://lsms-worldbank.github.io/susometa/reference/get_attachments.md)
  : Get metadata on attachments
- [`get_lookup_tables()`](https://lsms-worldbank.github.io/susometa/reference/get_lookup_tables.md)
  : Get metadata on lookup tables.
- [`get_critical_rules()`](https://lsms-worldbank.github.io/susometa/reference/get_critical_rules.md)
  : Get metadata on critical rules.

## Parsing tools

Low-level tools for parsing questionnaire metadata

### Reusable categories

- [`find_categories()`](https://lsms-worldbank.github.io/susometa/reference/find_categories.md)
  : Find paradata files
- [`parse_categories()`](https://lsms-worldbank.github.io/susometa/reference/parse_categories.md)
  : Parse all categories files into a single data frame
- [`parse_categories_file()`](https://lsms-worldbank.github.io/susometa/reference/parse_categories_file.md)
  : Parse a categories file
- [`reshape_categories()`](https://lsms-worldbank.github.io/susometa/reference/reshape_categories.md)
  : Reshape categories data
- [`join_categories()`](https://lsms-worldbank.github.io/susometa/reference/join_categories.md)
  : Join questionnaire metadata and categories metadata
